workerCollaboration.title: Collaborating with Workers and Agencies
paragraphs: We welcome skilled workers and agencies to partner with us. We value your expertise and commitment.
Together, we can effectively meet industry demands. By collaborating with us, you will be part of a network that ensures steady and rewarding opportunities.
We prioritize maintaining high standards of workforce quality, offering the best matches for your skills and needs.
Let’s join forces to create successful and sustainable employment solutions. Become part of a dynamic and thriving recruitment ecosystem.

glance.title: Arka Hire At a Glance

tabs.label: Short Overview
content: Arka Hire Limited is a leading manpower outsourcing company with over a decade of experience. The company is headquartered in London, UK, to support its international operations and client base.

We specialize in customized manpower management solutions designed to meet the unique needs of our clients. Our expert team excels at identifying top talent, ensuring a perfect fit for each organization’s specific requirements and budget.

tabs.label: Vision
content: Our vision is to become a trusted global manpower partner, connecting businesses with reliable, skilled, and committed workers across industries.
We aim to build long-term recruitment solutions that support business growth and create meaningful employment opportunities worldwide.

tabs.label: Mission
content: Our mission is to deliver professional manpower outsourcing services through quality recruitment, transparent processes, and continuous support.
We work closely with clients, agencies, and workers to create sustainable staffing solutions that benefit every partner involved.

glance.networkDescription: At Arka Hire, we believe that great achievements are built on strong partnerships. Whether you’re a solo agent or part of an agency, now is the perfect time to collaborate with us and deliver exceptional staffing solutions to clients worldwide.

floatingCard.title: Collaborative Onboarding
floatingCard.description: You’ll receive comprehensive guidance right from the start — understand our best practices, client expectations, and support systems.

letsTalk.title: Do you have any project in mind?

ourProcess.title: How We Find the Ideal Match for Your Business
ourProcess.description: Six carefully crafted steps to connect you with the world's best talent — efficiently, reliably, and beautifully.

steps.title: Initial Consultation
steps.description: Our initial consultation enables us to gain a comprehensive understanding of your specific requirements, allowing us to customize our recruitment approach and identify the most suitable global workers for your business.

steps.title: Worker Sourcing
steps.description: We connect you with top-tier global workers through an extensive network, ensuring access to high-quality candidates. Our customized solutions are designed to meet your business's specific demands.

steps.title: Screening and Selection
steps.description: Our screening and selection process guarantees that you receive only the highest quality workers through background checks, skills assessments, and interviews.

steps.title: Onboarding and Integration
steps.description: We offer comprehensive orientation, training, and support to ensure that workers quickly adapt and contribute meaningfully to your team.

steps.title: Accommodation
steps.description: We provide reliable accommodation solutions for workers, including sourcing and arranging suitable housing that meets employer requirements.

steps.title: Continuous Support
steps.description: We offer ongoing support to ensure the success and satisfaction of both employers and workers.

countrySendWorker.description: We place skilled workers across Europe's fastest-growing markets — matching talent with the right opportunities in Romania, Germany, Croatia, and the United Kingdom.

hero.title: An Agency Without Borders
hero.subtitle: We take pride in anticipating challenges and adapting to the evolving demands of the labor market.
hero.description: Our steadfast commitment to the success of our partners is unwavering.

items.label: Workers Replaced in the Last 5 Years

stats.title: Over a Decade of Expertise in Manpower Outsourcing
stats.description: Arka Hire is a prominent manpower outsourcing company, headquartered in London, UK. With over a decade of experience, we specialize in providing customized manpower management solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of our clients. Our expert team excels in identifying top talent, ensuring a perfect match for each organization’s specific requirements and budget. We offer a comprehensive range of services, including both temporary and permanent recruitment across various sectors worldwide. Our goal is to be the preferred human resources partner for both public and private sector organizations.

hrExpert.title: HR Experts Committed to Your Success

points.title: Tailored Recruitment Solutions
points.desc: We craft our recruitment strategies to align with your specific needs, ensuring that you receive the most qualified candidates.

points.title: Global Talent Acquisition
points.desc: Our expansive network enables us to source top-tier talent from across the globe for both temporary and permanent roles.

points.title: Comprehensive Legal Assistance
points.desc: We manage all legal aspects, from securing work permits to ensuring compliance with local regulations.

points.title: Integration and Support
points.desc: We assist with accommodation, vocational training, and language education to facilitate the smooth integration of new employees.

workforceSolution.title: Our Comprehensive Workforce Solutions for Your Business

services.title: Worker Acquisition
services.description: We specialize in identifying and attracting top talent. Our thorough recruitment process ensures we source the best candidates who are a perfect match for your organization's needs.

services.title: Workforce Solutions
services.description: We offer flexible staffing options to meet diverse requirements, from temporary to permanent placements, ensuring reliability and adaptability in your workforce.

services.title: Regulatory Compliance
services.description: Our expertise in legal and regulatory compliance guarantees that all hiring processes adhere to both local and international laws, minimizing risks for your business.

services.title: Strategic Workforce Planning
services.description: We assist in developing and implementing effective workforce strategies that align with your business goals, driving productivity and efficiency.

services.title: Background Checks
services.description: Our rigorous background checks and vetting processes ensure you hire trustworthy and qualified candidates, offering peace of mind and security.

services.title: Skills Training and Development
services.description: We provide targeted training and development programs to enhance the skills and capabilities of your workforce, ensuring they are well-prepared for job demands.

companyTimeline.title: Company Timeline
companyTimeline.subtitle: A decade of growth, innovation, and global impact in workforce solutions.

items.title: Launch and Foundation
items.desc: Arka Hire was founded in the UK, focusing on providing personalized manpower management services and assembling a skilled team to serve initial clients in the construction and manufacturing sectors.

items.title: Service Expansion
items.desc: We broadened our recruitment services to include both temporary and permanent staffing solutions, expanding into warehousing, logistics, and healthcare, thereby growing our client base significantly.

items.title: Industry Diversification
items.desc: We further expanded our offerings into new industries, including retail, hospitality, and IT, allowing us to cater to a wider range of client needs and market demands.

items.title: Global Expansion
items.desc: We enhanced our global presence by entering new international markets, solidifying our reputation as a leading recruitment partner and providing comprehensive manpower solutions worldwide.

heading: Client
Consultation
heroText: At Arka Hire, we recognize that every business has its own set of needs and challenges. Our client consultation services are tailored to provide solutions that are perfectly aligned with your unique requirements and objectives.
With over 10 years of experience in the manpower outsourcing industry, our expert consultants are equipped to offer strategic advice and support to help you achieve your business goals.
points: We design customized strategies to address your specific business challenges.
Our consultants provide informed guidance across sectors including technology, healthcare, and finance.
We leverage the latest technologies to enhance recruitment and HR processes.
We offer comprehensive support from initial consultation to seamless implementation.
Your success is our priority, with clear communication and lasting client relationships.

floatingCard.title: Practical guidance before every hiring decision.

cards.title: Strategic Recruitment Planning
cards.desc: We develop complete recruitment strategies aligned with your business goals, workforce needs, and growth plans.

cards.title: Talent Acquisition Management
cards.desc: We identify, attract, and retain qualified talent to move your business forward with confidence.

cards.title: Employee Engagement & Retention
cards.desc: We implement practical strategies to enhance employee satisfaction, reduce turnover, and improve performance.

cards.title: Workforce Planning & Optimization
cards.desc: We optimize your workforce for maximum efficiency, productivity, and long-term business value.

workerSourcing.heading: Worker Sourcing
workerSourcing.intro: We source our workforce from a diverse range of countries, including Bahrain, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, UAE, Bangladesh, India, Nepal, Sri Lanka, and Malaysia. Workers are deployed to Romania, Croatia, Germany, and the UK, fully prepared to integrate seamlessly.
points: Our Industry Expertise: We offer specialized knowledge across a broad spectrum of sectors, including construction, manufacturing, hospitality, agriculture, logistics, healthcare, and more
Comprehensive Solutions: We provide end-to-end services, ranging from talent sourcing and screening to compliance and deployment, ensuring a smooth and efficient process.
Client-Centric Approach: We focus on building strong, lasting relationships with clear communication and tailored services that address your unique needs.
Your Success, Our Priority: We are fully committed to achieving your goals by delivering excellence and enhancing productivity.
